zh.heroTagline: 物理智能开源数据平台
zh.heroDesc:
全球首个AI自主决策自然实验室启航，
L4-L5全自动驾驶挑战张家界天门山九十九道弯，让AI在大自然中理解物理世界
zh.aboutText:
在天门山 99 道弯,Hitch Open 正创造自动驾驶的 AlphaGo 时刻。

10.77 公里的天路,1100 米的落差,99 个弯道——
F1 传奇车手 Romain Dumas 曾以 7'36" 刷新人类极限。

而今年,清华大学 AI 赛车在无 GPS、低能见度、湿滑赛面的极限环境中,
以 16'10"838 全程自动驾驶登顶,
让 AI 首次在真实世界完成"感知—决策—行动"的闭环。

这一刻,物理智能的引擎被彻底点燃。
zh.recordsTeam1: 法国 F1 赛车手 Romain Dumas
zh.recordsTeam2: 清华大学 极限竞速战队
zh.missionTitle: Hitch Open以竞速之名,开启物理智能时代
zh.missionSubtitle: Hitch Open世界AI竞速锦标赛,以真实极限环境验证人工智能的感知与决策能力,推动AI从虚拟智能迈向物理智能。
zh.mission1Text: Hitch Open联合清华大学、复旦大学、浙江大学、湖南大学等高校，让学生在真实山路极限环境中完成AI系统研发与实车测试，成为物理智能时代的创新实践课堂。
zh.mission2Text: 通过天门山"无GPS、低能见度、多弯急坡"场景，验证AI算法在感知、决策、控制等环节的可靠性，加速物理AI从实验室走向真实世界。
zh.mission3Text: 依托中国电信5G-A网络与天翼云算力，赛事单场产生超3 TB真实物理数据，构建全球开放的物理智能数据平台，推动智能驾驶、文旅科技等产业地。
zh.mission4Text: 以公开竞赛与数据开源机制为标准，联合政府、科研、产业和投资界，检验AI安全性与产业可行性，为新质生产力与物理智能治理提供中国样本。

zh.mediaStatText3: 清华、复旦、上交等 6 所高校官方矩阵报道，覆盖 100 万+ 青年科技受众

zh.partnersSocial: 官方社交媒体合作平台
zh.trackTitle: 2025 决赛场地 - 天门山 99 道弯
zh.trackDescription: 天门山99道弯，被誉为"通天大道"，是全球最极限、最壮观的山路之一。大道两侧绝壁千仞，空谷幽深，180度急弯此消彼长。这里将成为AI竞速技术的终极试炼场，重新定义AI竞速的极限。
zh.trackImageDesc: 天门山99道弯，被誉为"通天大道"，是全球最极限的山路之一。全长逾10公里，180度急弯此消彼长。这里将成为AI竞速技术的终极试炼场，重新定义AI竞速的极限。

en.heroDesc:
The world's first AI autonomous decision-making natural laboratory launches,
L4-L5 fully autonomous driving challenges Zhangjiajie Tianmen Mountain's 99 bends, enabling AI to understand the physical world in nature
en.aboutTitle: The AlphaGo Moment of Physical Intelligence
en.aboutText:
At Tianmen Mountain's 99 bends, Hitch Open is creating autonomous driving's AlphaGo moment.

10.77 kilometers of skyward road, 1100 meters of elevation drop, 99 curves—
F1 legend Romain Dumas set the human limit at 7'36".

This year, Tsinghua University's AI racing car reached the summit with fully autonomous driving in 16'10"838,
under extreme conditions of no GPS, low visibility, and slippery surfaces,
achieving AI's first closed loop of "perception—decision—action" in the real world.

This moment, the engine of physical intelligence was fully ignited.
en.missionTitle: Hitch Open: Racing Forward to Physical Intelligence Era
en.missionSubtitle: The Hitch Open World AI Racing Championship validates AI perception and decision-making capabilities in real extreme environments, driving AI from virtual to physical intelligence.
en.mission1Text: Hitch Open partners with Tsinghua University, Fudan University, Zhejiang University, Hunan University and other institutions, enabling students to develop AI systems and conduct real vehicle testing in extreme mountain road environments, creating an innovative practice classroom for the physical intelligence era.
en.mission2Text: Through Tianmen Mountain's challenging scenarios of "no GPS, low visibility, sharp bends and steep slopes", we validate the reliability of AI algorithms in perception, decision-making, and control, accelerating the transition of physical AI from laboratory to real world.
en.mission3Text: Leveraging China Telecom's 5G-A network and cloud computing power, the event generates over 3TB of real-world physical data per race, building a global open physical intelligence data platform to drive intelligent driving, cultural tourism technology and other industries.
en.mission4Text: Using open competition and data open-source mechanisms as standards, we collaborate with government, research, industry and investment sectors to verify AI safety and industrial feasibility, providing a Chinese model for new productive forces and physical intelligence governance.

en.impactSublabel3: Peak topic heat on the day
en.mediaStatText1: 28 national-level and industry mainstream media outlets reporting together
en.mediaStatText3: Official coverage from 6 universities including Tsinghua, Fudan, SJTU, reaching 1M+ young tech audience
en.mediaStatText4: 7 leading media including Yicai, TMTPost, 36Kr providing in-depth analysis of AI physical intelligence value
en.mediaStatText5: Coverage from Xinhua English, China Daily and other international media outlets
en.trackSubtitle: The Ultimate Challenge for AI Racing
en.trackDescription: The Tianmen Mountain 99 Bends, known as the "Road to Heaven", is one of the most extreme and spectacular mountain roads in the world. With cliffs towering on both sides and deep valleys, the 180-degree sharp turns appear one after another. This will become the ultimate testing ground for AI racing technology, redefining the limits of AI racing.
en.trackImageDesc: The Tianmen Mountain 99 Bends, known as the "Road to Heaven", is one of the most extreme mountain roads in the world. Stretching over 10 kilometers with 180-degree sharp turns appearing one after another, this will become the ultimate testing ground for AI racing technology, redefining the limits of AI racing.
